description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine setdiagrespflowcheck_2, and is implemented by a call to setdiagrespflowcheck_2. Use this API to specify the Power Flow voltage and range checking annotation options in the active Slider diagram. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. setdiagrespflowcheck(logarr, vlnwdt, vlnsty, vltval, vlnclrr, vlnclrg, vlnclrb, linlod, llodarr, llodclr, busvlt, busvltwdt, busclrr, busclrg, busclrb, outarr, outclr, brnrat, barpercent, barclrr, barclrg, barclrb)
python_syntax: setdiagrespflowcheck(logarr, vlnwdt, vlnsty, vltval, vlnclrr, vlnclrg, vlnclrb, linlod, llodarr, llodclr, busvlt, busvltwdt, busclrr, busclrg, busclrb, outarr, outclr, brnrat, barpercent, barclrr, barclrg, barclrb)

parameters.name: logarr
parameters.description: An array of four elements specifying flag to determine what annotation is applied. Each element has only two possible values. 0 = FALSE and 1 = TRUE. (input).

parameters.name: vlnwdt
parameters.description: An array of eight elements specifying the width of diagram elements that fall in the appropriate voltage range. (input).

parameters.name: vlnsty
parameters.description: An array of eight elements specifying the line style of diagram elements that fall in the appropriate voltage range. (input).

parameters.name: vltval
parameters.description: An array of 7 elements specifying set the voltage ranges used to assign annotation diagram. Base voltage values should be in ascending order. (input).

parameters.name: vlnclrr
parameters.description: An array of eight elements specifying the Red color component of diagram elements that fall in the appropriate voltage range, 0->255. (input).

parameters.name: vlnclrg
parameters.description: An array of eight elements specifying the Green color component of diagram elements that fall in the appropriate voltage range, 0->255. (input).

parameters.name: vlnclrb
parameters.description: An array of eight elements specifying the Blue color component of diagram elements that fall in the appropriate voltage range, 0->255. (input).

parameters.name: linlod
parameters.description: % loading for line rating. (input).

parameters.name: llodarr
parameters.description: An array of two elements specifying the width and style of diagram items that exceed the % of line loading. (input).

parameters.name: llodclr
parameters.description: An array of three elements specifying color for lines that exceed the % loading rating, LINLOD. (input).

parameters.name: busvlt
parameters.description: An array of two elements specifying the bus voltage check Min and Max. (input).

parameters.name: busvltwdt
parameters.description: An array of two elements specifying the bus voltage check width of diagram items at the Min and Max. (input).

parameters.name: busclrr
parameters.description: An array of two elements specifying the Red color component of diagram elements that fall in the appropriate bus voltage range, 0->255. (input).

parameters.name: busclrg
parameters.description: An array of two elements specifying the Green color component of diagram elements that fall in the appropriate bus voltage range, 0->255. (input).

parameters.name: busclrb
parameters.description: An array of two elements specifying the Blue color component of diagram elements that fall in the appropriate bus voltage range, 0->255. (input).

parameters.name: outarr
parameters.description: An array of two elements specifying the width and style of diagram items that are out of service. (input).

parameters.name: outclr
parameters.description: An array of three elements specifying color for diagram items that are out of service. (input).

parameters.name: brnrat
parameters.description: Branch rating set. (input).

parameters.name: barpercent
parameters.description: An array of four elements specifying percent overloads at which to apply different color schemes for the line loading charts on the diagram. (input).

parameters.name: barclrr
parameters.description: An array of four elements specifying the Red color component for the line loading charts on the diagram, 0->255. (input).

parameters.name: barclrg
parameters.description: An array of four elements specifying the Green color component for the line loading charts on the diagram, 0->255. (input).

parameters.name: barclrb
parameters.description: An array of four elements specifying the Blue color component for the line loading charts on the diagram, 0->255. (input).

barclrr.description: first line loading chart red value.
second line loading chart red value.
third line loading chart red value.
fourth line loading chart red value.

barclrg.description: first line loading chart green value.
second line loading chart green value.
third line loading chart green value.
fourth line loading chart green value.

barclrb.description: first line loading chart blue value.
second line loading chart blue value.
third line loading chart blue value.
fourth line loading chart blue value.
